title: ISP French Polynesia Recreational Scuba Diving
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8e3k8","text":"This landscape study aims to assess the current state of the recreational diving industry in French Polynesia, particularly from a local community perspective. The main focus of study will be to investigate local perceptions of industry. Particularly:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":160,"length":91}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5lc7i","text":"The perceived impact on the local community – whether positive or negative","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":74}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4cnif","text":"The perceived presence or absence of local participation – motivators and deterrents such as existing barriers to entry in the industry","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":135}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ssnd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cskme","text":"To achieve the aims outlined, this study will also need to investigate the wider context of the French Polynesian recreational dive industry – information about which seems to be lacking in current literature. Hence, in the following protocol I highlight the procedure I followed to gather some preliminary information about the demographics of recreational scuba dive clubs in French Polynesia","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Navigate to Google Directory of dive clubs in French Polynesia through query "Scuba diving centres in French Polynesia"
Open "Website" link for each directory entry in a new tab
Open in a new tab each entry listing a club whose club website was not opened in step 1
For each page, open in a new tab the club's website
Scroll or navigate to the portion of the webpage that lists the club's staff - typically listed under "Our Team"

On each dive club's website, select the language choice to be English or use web browser built-in French to English translation tools Built-in Safari translation tool Website translation, click on American Flag
Note down the club name, location and web address in a spreadsheet
Note down the number of instructors and types of certifications possessed in the same spreadsheet. If no certification info is listed, also note this down.
creator: Stephanie Gay
